originalTitle: Leading anti‑racism activist in Tunisia jailed for eight years
title: Leading anti‑racism activist in Tunisia jailed for eight years
content: Saadia Mosbah campaigned for migrants, particularly after President Kais Saied said they posed a demographic threat to the country.

originalTitle: Desperate for food, drought-stricken Kenyans turn to the gingerbread tree
title: Desperate for food, drought-stricken Kenyans turn to the gingerbread tree
content: Some 26 million people are "facing extreme hunger" in Kenya, Ethiopia and Somalia, warns humanitarian organisation Oxfam.

originalTitle: UK agrees deal to ease migrant returns to Nigeria
title: UK agrees deal to ease migrant returns to Nigeria
content: It comes during the Nigerian president's state visit to the UK - the first by a west African leader in 37 years.

originalTitle: Iran’s Supreme Leader Khamenei says enemy ‘defeated’ in audio message
title: Iran’s Supreme Leader Khamenei says enemy ‘defeated’ in audio message
content: Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has released an audio message for the Persian New Year.

originalTitle: Ex-minister Gamboa targeted in Costa Rica’s first extradition to the US
title: Ex-minister Gamboa targeted in Costa Rica’s first extradition to the US
content: A former Supreme Court justice, Celso Gamboa was accused by the US of using government connections to traffic cocaine.

originalTitle: US says it struck alleged drug trafficking vessel in Pacific, killing two
title: US says it struck alleged drug trafficking vessel in Pacific, killing two
content: In an initial statement, the US military said three people survived the strike but did not offer additional details.

originalTitle: Norway's crown princess breaks silence, claiming she was 'manipulated and deceived' by Epstein
title: Norway's crown princess breaks silence, claiming she was 'manipulated and deceived' by Epstein
content: Crown Princess Mette Marit tells Norwegian TV she wishes she had never met the late sex offender.

originalTitle: Ukraine-Hungary oil pipeline row threatens EU loan
title: Ukraine-Hungary oil pipeline row threatens EU loan
content: Kyiv and Budapest disagree on how badly damaged a hub in western Ukraine bombed by Russia really is, as its oil flow remains suspended.

originalTitle: Israel strikes Syria after Druze clashes
title: Israel strikes Syria after Druze clashes
content: Syria condemned the strikes on weapons sites and government infrastructure as an "outrageous" assault on Syria's sovereignty.

originalTitle: One final experiment? Unpicking Tuchel's latest England squad
title: One final experiment? Unpicking Tuchel's latest England squad
content: Thomas Tuchel's expanded England squad offers hope to forgotten men but shows problems before the World Cup, writes Phil McNulty.

originalTitle: No contact, no World Cup place? What went wrong for Alexander-Arnold?
title: No contact, no World Cup place? What went wrong for Alexander-Arnold?
content: Trent Alexander-Arnold's omission from Thomas Tuchel's biggest England squad is the latest blow to his stop-start international career and casts huge doubt on his hopes of playing at the World Cup.

originalTitle: Alisson out of Brazil squad and will miss Brighton
title: Alisson out of Brazil squad and will miss Brighton
content: Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson will not face Brighton on Saturday because of injury and has withdrawn from the Brazil squad for their friendlies later this month.
